THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEAN, CHERYL DEAN, J. BINGHAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1942 PACIFIC AVENUE $20,584.45 RENT, $24,714.85 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,281.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $47,580.65, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
